zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe DE CREQUY於1195年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛時，他的父親Baudouin III DE CREQUY25歲，母親Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais20歲。他於1221年與Alix DE PICQUIGNY在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1255年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CREQUY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe DE CREQUY was born in 1195, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Baudouin III DE CREQUY, was 25 and his mother, Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais, was 20. He married Alix DE PICQUIGNY in 1221, in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1255, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe DE CREQUY est né en 1195, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Baudouin III DE CREQUY, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alix DE PICQUIGNY en 1221, à Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1255, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe DE CREQUY 1195 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin III DE CREQUY 25 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais 20. Er hat 1221 in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Alix DE PICQUIGNY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1255 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe DE CREQUY è nato il nel 1195 nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin III DE CREQUY, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alix DE PICQUIGNY nel 1221, nel Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1255, nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe DE CREQUYが1195年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで生まれた時，父Baudouin III DE CREQUYは25歳，母Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmaraisは20歳であった。1221年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピククイグニーでAlix DE PICQUIGNYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1255年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippe DE CREQUY(이)가 1195년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin III DE CREQUY(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1221년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피c키그니에서 Alix DE PICQUIGNY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe DE CREQUY nasceu em 1195, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Baudouin III DE CREQUY, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix DE PICQUIGNY em 1221, em Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1255, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe DE CREQUY родился в 1195 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin III DE CREQUY было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix DE PICQUIGNY в 1221 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1255 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe DE CREQUY nació en 1195, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Baudouin III DE CREQUY, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alix DE PICQUIGNY en 1221, en Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1255, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
